mapper.select: SELECT ITEM_ID , ITEM_NAME , ITEM_SIZE , PARENT_ID , ITEM_TYPE , EXTENSION , LAST_MODIFIED_AT FROM ( SELECT FOLDER_ID AS ITEM_ID , FOLDER_NAME AS ITEM_NAME , 0 AS ITEM_SIZE , PARENT_FOLDER_ID AS PARENT_ID , 'FOLDER' AS ITEM_TYPE , NULL AS EXTENSION , TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS LAST_MODIFIED_AT FROM NAS_FOLDER WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND FOLDER_ID <> PARENT_FOLDER_ID AND PARENT_FOLDER_ID = #{folderId} AND USER_CODE = #{userCode} UNION ALL SELECT FILE_ID AS ITEM_ID , ORIGIN_NAME AS ITEM_NAME , FILE_SIZE AS ITEM_SIZE , FOLDER_ID AS PARENT_ID , 'FILE' AS ITEM_TYPE , EXTENSION AS EXTENSION , TO_CHAR(LAST_MODIFIED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS LAST_MODIFIED_AT FROM NAS_FILE WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND FOLDER_ID = #{folderId} AND USER_CODE = #{userCode} ) T ORDER BY ITEM_TYPE DESC, LAST_MODIFIED_AT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE NAS_FILE_PREVIEW SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' , DELETED_AT = NOW() WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId}
